sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.subtitle: We care for the planet as much as for flavour.
sustainability.introBody: We believe luxury can coexist with respect for nature. From sourcing to packaging, we work to reduce our footprint at every step.
sustainability.p1Body: We source our ingredients from local producers, in season, wherever possible.
sustainability.p2Body: Our cake boxes are made from recyclable, plastic-free materials.
sustainability.p3Body: We minimise production surplus and repurpose leftovers.
sustainability.p4Body: We use energy-efficient equipment and lighting in our atelier.

press.title: Press & Awards
press.subtitle: What's said about us and the awards we've won.
press.quote1: One of Istanbul's most creative cake ateliers.
press.quote2: A brand that seeks perfection in every detail.
press.quote3: The new address of luxury patisserie.

occasions.title: Occasions
occasions.subtitle: Every moment is worth celebrating. Choose the cake experience that suits you.
occasions.weddingDesc: Grand designs worthy of the most special day of your life.
occasions.birthdayDesc: Joyful, colourful cakes for everyone, big and small.
occasions.corporateDesc: Professional solutions that add prestige to your brand.
occasions.babyDesc: An elegant hello to a new life.
occasions.customDesc: Let's create your dream design from scratch, together.

atelier.title: Our Atelier
atelier.subtitle: In the heart of Nişantaşı, where every cake is born.
atelier.spaceBody: Our atelier is a space where modern equipment, handmade tradition and boundless creativity meet. Every corner is designed in pursuit of perfection.

collections.title: Collections

giftcard.lead: Atelier Cake gift cards let your loved ones choose their dream cake. Delivered digitally by email.
giftcard.note: Gift cards are valid for 12 months.

home.heroSub: Istanbul's most elegant bespoke cake atelier. Let's design your dream cake together.

about.title: About Us
about.lead: Istanbul's home of handmade luxury cakes
about.story: Atelier Cake was born from a passion that sees cake-making as an art. Every cake is a unique creation that tells our client's story.
about.founderBio: Trained at Le Cordon Bleu in Paris, Defne has over 15 years of experience and has made Atelier Cake Istanbul's most distinguished cake atelier.
about.value1Desc: Every cake is crafted one by one, by hand.
about.value3Desc: Entirely unique designs, just for you.

cookie.text: We use cookies to improve your experience. Your data is protected under KVKK.

weddings.introTitle: Let Your Love Story Become Sugar
weddings.introBody: Every wedding cake is a unique creation that tells the couple's story. With one-to-one consultation, a tasting session and event-day setup, we deliver a flawless experience.
